name: GigCapital7 Corp.
summary: GigCapital7 Corp. is a blank check company (SPAC) incorporated as a Cayman Islands entity, formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination. The company completed an IPO and is pursuing a business combination with Hadron Energy, Inc., a Delaware corporation, pursuant to a Business Combination Agreement dated September 27, 2025, with a 21-month Completion Window from IPO closing.

partnerships.description: Sponsor of GigCapital7, providing working capital loans and holding founder shares and private placement warrants.
Target company for business combination per Business Combination Agreement dated September 27, 2025.
